subject: A decorative hand bell with a polished metallic body and a red gemstone set at the top, illustrated as a TCG Item card
description: A single decorative hand bell dominates the frame against a pale blue-white background. The bell has a polished metallic body that catches warm reflected light, and a vivid red gemstone is set into its crown. The handle is slender and the overall design suggests a ceremonial or magical object rather than a utilitarian tool. The composition is clean and object-focused with soft, even lighting that emphasizes the bell's reflective surface and the gem's color contrast against the neutral background.
foreground: A polished hand bell with a red gemstone set at its crown
